title: December 15, 2014 – Brutis Baez
summary: Big in the Native American hip-hop scene, rapper Brutis Baez (a.k.a. Bigg B) is Nez Perce, Paiute, and Wasco, from Warm Springs, Oregon. With songs written to flow thematically like a movie, his album Here Today, Bigg Tomorrow is Bigg B’s t hird solo release and the first album he recorded, mixed, a...
